releaseNotes:
• Fix: "Re-match all channels" could hang forever at "Downloading & parsing…" if the EPG server stalled mid-stream. A 60-second per-chunk watchdog now closes the stalled stream and completes the match on whatever data arrived — the dialog always finishes instead of requiring a force-close.
• Fix: after a fresh install + backup import, sources that were disabled in the backup were incorrectly created as enabled. Disabled sources now stay disabled after import.
• Improvement: the sources-refresh dialog no longer risks getting stuck at "Preparing…" on fast devices due to a startup race condition. EPG refresh and re-match operations now write detailed progress to the debug log.
